en_title: After Another Xbox No-Show the Wait for The Elder Scrolls VI Goes On, and Fans Aren't Getting Any Younger
cn_title: 《上古卷轴6》再缺席Xbox发布会，粉丝苦等8年
subtitle: 再见了，老朋友
opus_summary: 《上古卷轴6》在2026年Xbox游戏展示会上再次缺席，自2018年公布已8年。粉丝从期待转为焦虑，调侃等游戏发售时孩子都该高中毕业了。陶德·霍华德表示仍需时间打磨，但玩家已等得不耐烦。

paragraphs.en: Another Xbox Games Showcase, another no-show from The Elder Scrolls VI . Yes, we know it’s in development — Bethesda chief Todd Howard pops up to reassure fans every now and then. But the unescapable fact is this is a game that was announced eight years ago, on June 10, 2018, with a teaser trailer and we’ve not seen anything of it since. It also means that the wait between the announcement of The Elder Scrolls VI and now is longer than the wait between the release of The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim and the announcement of The Elder Scrolls VI itself. We don’t even know the name of the game, or where in the fantasy world it’s set. Information-starved GTA 6 fans don’t know how good they’ve got it!
paragraphs.cn: 又一场Xbox游戏展示会，又一次《上古卷轴6》缺席。是的，我们知道它正在开发中——B社老大陶德·霍华德时不时会冒出来安抚粉丝。但无法回避的事实是，这款游戏早在八年前（2018年6月10日）就通过一段预告片公布了，此后我们再也没有看到任何实质内容。这也意味着，从《上古卷轴6》公布至今的等待时间，已经超过了从《上古卷轴5：天际》发售到《上古卷轴6》公布之间的间隔。我们甚至连游戏的名字都不知道，也不知道它设定在奇幻世界的哪个角落。那些信息匮乏的《GTA6》粉丝根本不知道自己有多幸福！

paragraphs.en: As you’d expect, The Elder Scrolls fans have reacted with disappointment to last week's Xbox Games Showcase. Some had dared to hope for at least a mention of the upcoming game. Of course, Bethesda turned up with updates for Fallout 76 and The Elder Scrolls Online, as it always does, but no word on The Elder Scrolls VI. It’s the hope that kills you, as they say.
paragraphs.cn: 不出所料，《上古卷轴》粉丝对上周的Xbox游戏展示会感到失望。有些人曾大胆期待至少能提到这款即将到来的游戏。当然，B社照例带来了《辐射76》和《上古卷轴OL》的更新，但对《上古卷轴6》只字未提。俗话说，希望越大，失望越大。

paragraphs.en: It’s gotten to the point now where some are realizing just how much their lives have changed since Skyrim’s release, and they're starting to worry about when they'll actually play The Elder Scrolls VI (2027? 2028? 2029?). “I was pregnant with my oldest son when Skyrim was released on my birthday,” . “He just celebrated his 14th birthday. I can't wait to give him this as a graduation present.”
paragraphs.cn: 现在情况已经到了这种地步：一些人开始意识到自《天际》发售以来他们的生活发生了多大变化，并开始担心自己究竟何时才能玩到《上古卷轴6》（2027年？2028年？2029年？）。「《天际》在我生日那天发售时，我正怀着我的大儿子，」一位粉丝说道，「他刚过了14岁生日。我迫不及待想把这游戏当作他的毕业礼物。」

paragraphs.en: Some have even equated the wait for The Elder Scrolls VI to the carrion Emperor’s status sat on the Golden Throne in the grimdark far future of the 41st millennium. “It's uncomfortable how many years have passed and how old I am now. I've lived through my teens and now my 20s. Heading into my 30s and it still hasn't come. How much longer Bethesda, gonna be in a nappy at this rate,” said Branman1234.
paragraphs.cn: 有些人甚至将等待《上古卷轴6》比作41千年的黑暗遥远未来中，腐尸帝王端坐黄金王座的情景。「这么多年过去了，我现在年纪这么大了，这让人很不舒服。我经历了十几岁，现在二十多岁，眼看就要三十了，它还没来。B社，还要等多久？照这样下去，我都要穿尿布了，」Branman1234说道。

paragraphs.en: “At this point it is more likely we will get the announcement of Skyrim for PS6 before TES VI,” joked another. “It’s actually bonkers, and frankly a stupid business decision, to wait 15 (probably 20 years) to follow up on one of the most popular game franchises of all time,” another said.
paragraphs.cn: 「到这个时候，我们更有可能先看到《天际》登陆PS6的公告，而不是《上古卷轴6》，」另一位粉丝调侃道。「等15年（可能20年）才去跟进史上最受欢迎的游戏系列之一，这简直疯了，坦率地说是个愚蠢的商业决策，」又一人说道。

paragraphs.en: The last time Todd Howard talked about The Elder Scrolls VI was in March 2026 , when he joked that we should all pretend Bethesda hadn't announced it. This is a recurring theme; in February, Howard admitted — once again — that he would have preferred not to have announced the game so early.
paragraphs.cn: 陶德·霍华德上一次谈论《上古卷轴6》是在2026年3月，当时他开玩笑说，我们都应该假装B社没有公布过这款游戏。这是一个反复出现的主题；今年2月，霍华德再次承认，他宁愿当初没有这么早公布这款游戏。

paragraphs.en: Howard has warned eager fans as recently as last November that the game is " still a long way off " and has even teased that he may just shadow drop it. He reiterated in February that "it's gonna be a while yet," and confirmed that, "We're able to play it, we're about to pass a big milestone internally, the majority of the studio is on the game and some of our partners."
paragraphs.cn: 霍华德最近一次警告心急的粉丝是在去年11月，他说这款游戏「还有很长的路要走」，甚至暗示他可能会直接突袭发售。他在2月重申「还需要一段时间」，并确认「我们已经能玩到了，内部即将通过一个重大里程碑，工作室的大部分人以及我们的一些合作伙伴都在参与这款游戏。」

paragraphs.en: But Howard has also claimed all this waiting is necessary for the game to be great.
paragraphs.cn: 但霍华德也表示，所有这些等待都是为了让游戏变得出色所必需的。

paragraphs.en: “What do fans really want?” he said in December of last year . “Do they want a game that comes out before it should and doesn’t meet their expectations? Or do they want the turkey that is in the oven for long enough to be delicious when it finally comes out of the oven, you know? That’s what I think people are going to want. So, we’re going to take our time and as long as it needs to be great.”
paragraphs.cn: 「粉丝们真正想要的是什么？」他在去年12月说道，「他们是想要一款仓促推出、达不到预期的游戏？还是想要一只在烤箱里烤得足够久、出炉时美味可口的火鸡，你懂吗？我认为人们想要的是后者。所以，我们会慢慢来，花足够的时间把它做好。」

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Xbox Games Showcase 2026 , if you fancy reading about loads of video games that aren't The Elder Scrolls VI.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解一大堆不是《上古卷轴6》的游戏，这里是2026年Xbox游戏展示会上公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他。也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系Wesley。

source contains 'Bethesda', but required dictionary translation 'B社/贝塞斯达' is missing
